---
title: "Code Lookup Browser"
subtitle: "ICES vocabulary codes used in the database"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

{{< include _db-setup.qmd >}}

```{=html}
<!-- DataTables CSS -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/2.0.8/css/dataTables.dataTables.min.css"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/3.0.2/css/buttons.dataTables.min.css"/>

<!-- Load jQuery and DataTables as plain script tags so DataTables
     correctly attaches to the same jQuery global before OJS runs -->
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/2.0.8/js/dataTables.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/3.0.2/js/dataTables.buttons.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/3.0.2/js/buttons.html5.min.js"></script>

<style>
/* Prevent multi-line table headers */
th { white-space: nowrap; }

/* Download button spacing */
.dt-buttons { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }

/* Space before "entries per page" label */
.dt-length label { gap: 6px; }
.dt-length select { margin-right: 4px; }

/* Remove Quarto cell wrapper margins inside the selector flex row
   so the selector and button align to the same baseline */
.selector-row > div { margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; }
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// --- Hardcoded code name → data_col mapping ---
code_list = [
  { label: "Monitoring programme code (MPROG)",                    value: "project"     },
  { label: "Purpose code (PURPM)",                                  value: "purpose"     },
  { label: "Reporting laboratory / institute code (RLABO)",         value: "institute"   },
  { label: "Sample type code (SMTYP)",                              value: "sample_type" },
  { label: "Parameter code (PARAM)",                                value: "param"       },
  { label: "Parameter group code (Pargroup)",                       value: "group_code"  },
  { label: "Analysing laboratory code (RLABO)",                     value: "labo"        },
  { label: "Sample storage method code (METST)",                    value: "metst"       },
  { label: "Pre-treatment method code (METPT)",                     value: "metpt"       },
  { label: "Chemical fixation / preservation method code (METPS)",  value: "metps"       },
  { label: "Chemical extraction method code (METCX)",               value: "metcx"       },
  { label: "Analytical method code (METOA)",                        value: "metoa"       },
  { label: "Reference code (REFSK)",                                value: "ref"         },
  { label: "Matrix code (MATRX)",                                   value: "matrix"      },
  { label: "Basis of measurement code (BASIS)",                     value: "basis"       },
  { label: "Data quality flag code (QFLAG)",                        value: "qflag"       },
  { label: "Validity flag code (VFLAG)",                            value: "vflag"       },
  { label: "Uncertainty calculation method code (METCU)",           value: "metcu"       },
  { label: "Data conversion flag code (DCFLG)",                     value: "dcflag"      }
]
```

```{=html}
<div class="selector-row" style="display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:12px;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
```

```{ojs}
// viewof correctly maintains visual state across reactive updates
viewof selected_code = Inputs.select(code_list, {
  label: "Code:",
  format: d => d.label,
  value: code_list[0],
  width: 500
})
```

```{ojs}
// Download button — sits beside the selector via the flex wrapper above
{
  // Invisible spacer matches the height of the "Code:" label above the selector,
  // so the button bottom aligns with the select box bottom
  const spacer = html`<div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;visibility:hidden;">&nbsp;</div>`

  const btn = html`<button style="
    padding: 5px 14px;
    font-size: 13px;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: #f8f8f8;
    color: #000;
  ">⬇ Download CSV</button>`

  btn.onclick = () => {
    const rows = [["Raw Code", "Code", "Description"]]
    lookup_data.forEach(r =>
      rows.push([r["Raw Code"], r["Code"], r["Description"] ?? ""])
    )
    const csv  = rows.map(r =>
      r.map(v => `"${String(v).replace(/"/g, '""')}"`).join(",")
    ).join("\n")
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: "text/csv" })
    const a    = Object.assign(document.createElement("a"), {
      href:     URL.createObjectURL(blob),
      download: `code_lookup_${selected_code.value}.csv`
    })
    a.click()
  }

  const container = html`<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;"></div>`
  container.append(spacer, btn)
  return container
}
```

```{=html}
</div>
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// --- Query code_lookup for the selected data_col ---
lookup_data = db.query(`
  SELECT
    raw_code     AS "Raw Code",
    code         AS "Code",
    description  AS "Description"
  FROM code_lookup
  WHERE data_col = '${selected_code.value}'
  ORDER BY raw_code, code
`)
```

```{ojs}
{
  // jQuery and DataTables are loaded via <script> tags in the HTML block above,
  // so window.jQuery / window.$ are available here without require()
  const jq = window.jQuery

  const wrapper = html`<div></div>`
  yield wrapper

  // Destroy any previous DataTable instance to avoid re-init errors
  const prevTable = wrapper.querySelector("table")
  if (prevTable && jq.fn.DataTable.isDataTable(prevTable)) {
    jq(prevTable).DataTable().destroy()
  }

  // Build table element
  const table = html`
    <table id="code-lookup-dt" class="display" style="width:100%">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Raw Code</th>
          <th>Code</th>
          <th>Description</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        ${lookup_data.map(row => html`
          <tr>
            <td>${row["Raw Code"]}</td>
            <td>${row["Code"]}</td>
            <td>${row["Description"] ?? ""}</td>
          </tr>
        `)}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  `

  wrapper.innerHTML = ""
  wrapper.appendChild(table)

  // Initialise DataTables with search, per-column filters, and CSV download
  const dt = jq(table).DataTable({
    pageLength: 20,
    lengthMenu: [10, 20, 50, 100],
    order: [[0, "asc"]],
    // 'l' = length menu, 'f' = omitted (no global search), 'r' = processing,
    // 't' = table, 'i' = info, 'p' = pagination
    dom: 'lrtip',
    buttons: [],
    // Per-column filter row
    initComplete() {
      this.api().columns().every(function () {
        const col    = this
        const header = col.header()
        const input  = document.createElement("input")
        input.placeholder = `Filter ${header.textContent}…`
        input.style.cssText = "width:100%;margin-top:4px;font-size:12px;padding:2px 4px;box-sizing:border-box;"
        header.appendChild(document.createElement("br"))
        header.appendChild(input)
        input.addEventListener("input", () => {
          col.search(input.value).draw()
        })
      })
    }
  })

  // Clean up DataTable on cell invalidation (when selection changes)
  invalidation.then(() => {
    if (jq.fn.DataTable.isDataTable(table)) jq(table).DataTable().destroy()
  })
}
```
